service.name: SEC EDGAR API
service.description_for_ai: Free US Securities and Exchange Commission filings database. 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly, 8-K current events, S-1 IPOs, insider trading (Form 4). All public company filings since 1993. No API key needed.

auth.note: Must set User-Agent header with your name and email

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get financial data for any US public company: revenue, net income, assets, EPS. Structured data from all SEC filings.

cik.description: CIK number with leading zeros e.g. CIK0000320193 for Apple

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search SEC filings by company name, ticker, or CIK. Returns list of filings with dates and types.

agent_hints.user_agent: Must set User-Agent: YourName YourEmail@domain.com per SEC policy.
